title: Create: Alchemy
description: This mod uses my new Modern Elements mod to add chemical processing to the Create mod
body:
This mod adds new machines to process items into chemicals and to use those chemicals to make other resources. 

Currently, there is just one new machine called the Dissolver. There will be more in the future of course. 

The Dissolver breaks items into chemicals (Solids, Liquids, and Gases), the solids are able to be pulled out from the sides of the Dissolver while the Liquids and Gases are pushed from the Dissolver Tanks placed above the machine.

There are recipes right now to melt the chemical dusts into fluids and to turn the dusts into the nuggets. 

Dusts can be gotten from the Dissolver for various recipes
